channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: ‘Odyssey’ director Christopher Nolan calls AI an obvious ‘Trojan horse’
US Marshals arrest the Tate brothers in Miami
item.description: The manosphere influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate were arrested Saturday in Miami by US Marshals in relation to new rape and sex trafficking charges in England. According to the Associated Press, British authorities are seeking the brothers' extradition. The new charges facing Andrew Tate include seven counts of rape, three of sex trafficking, three counts […]...

item.title: Nonprofit Current AI is racing to build the World Wide Web of AI, free for all
item.description: Current AI, a non-profit building AI that leaves no one culture behind, has made remarkable progress across devices, AI chat and more.

item.title: I'm worried about the future of MacBooks — and these M7 chip rumors are to blame
item.description: Is Apple wise to be doubling-down on AI with its M7 and M8 chips? This rumored new strategy is worrying if you ask me.

item.title: Treize ans après mon 1er essai, j’ai conduit la dernière Tesla Model S : c’est elle, la voiture la plus importante du 21ᵉ siècle
item.description: Treize ans après mon premier essai de la Tesla Model S, j’ai profité de sa retraite pour reprendre une dernière fois son volant. De quoi revenir sur la fascinante carrière de la Model S, qui a révolutionné la manière dont on perçoit, vit et crée une voiture électrique. J’en suis persuadé : c’est elle, la voiture la plus importante du 21ᵉ siècle, et je vous explique pourquoi. ...

item.title: Im watching the Belgian GP for free this weekend — how to live stream F1 for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the Belgian GP in the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch Spain vs. Argentina in the 2026 World Cup final online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Spain vs. Argentina in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 FIFA World Cup online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: France orders Polymarket blocked over illegal gambling promotion
item.description: France has ordered internet providers to block Polymarket, citing illegal gambling promotion and an unresolved rigged-bets investigation.

item.title: Are OLED TVs still worth the premium in 2026?
item.description: OLED displays are the best of the best in many ways, but in some scenarios, "lesser" technology really shines.

item.title: Xiaomi Electric Scooter 6 Max : cette nouvelle trottinette haut de gamme est déjà à prix réduit
item.description: La Xiaomi Electric Scooter 6 Max est remplie de fonctionnalités intéressantes comme sa compatibilité avec l'application « Localiser » d'Apple. Si elle vous fait de l'œil depuis un moment, c'est l'heure de sauter le pas puisqu'elle est en promotion chez Darty, mais aussi à la Fnac.

item.title: The Clapper was a bad smart home gadget — and a viral sensation
item.description: Clap on. Clap off. Well, more like, Clap, pause for half a beat but no longer because otherwise it'll stop hearing you, clap again because you waited too long, clap louder and faster, that didn't work, clap two more times, and suddenly: on. The Clapper didn't always work - and even when it did, it […]

item.title: L’Univers serait-il plus jeune que prévu ? Le désaccord qui ébranle nos certitudes
item.description: Depuis quelques années, des mesures contradictoires sur l'accélération de l'expansion de l'espace questionnent la physique et la cosmologie. C'est l'énigme de la tension de Hubble et elle a des implications sur la détermination de l'âge du cosmos observable depuis le Big Bang.

item.title: Think you're the ultimate Tom Holland Spider-Man fan? Put your knowledge to the test against our Marvel mastermind in this tricky MCU quiz
item.description: Spider-Man: Brand New Day swings into theaters very soon — and we want to see how much you know about Tom Holland's MCU career before it does.

item.title: What is the release date for Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender on Paramount+?
item.description: If you're not digging the live-action Netflix show, Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender might appeal to you instead — but, when will it arrive on Paramount+?

item.title: Don’t let unreliable free VPNs ruin your World Cup Final watch party – here’s the cheapest way to watch securely
item.description: Free VPNs often come with limitations that can interfere with video streaming – here’s our pick for a paid option that’s worth the extra price

item.title: Which DJI camera should I buy? Here's our essential guide to your options, including the results of our in-depth testing
item.description: Wondering whether to go Osmo Action or Pocket, or shake it up with a Nano? Here's what you need to know.
